evals.name: Shape a vague bug report into a ticket
evals.prompt: Shape this: 'The model editor keeps crashing when I paste large JSON — happened three times this morning.'
evals.expected_output: The agent creates a shaped bug ticket with: ticket type Bug, the problem described, expected vs actual behavior, scope, acceptance criteria, and suggested validation style. It does not add unnecessary ceremony.
assertions: Produces a ticket with type Bug

evals.name: Assess an existing ticket rather than blindly reshaping it
evals.prompt: Shape MID-456: 'Add dark mode support to the settings page. Acceptance: toggle works, persists across sessions, respects system preference.'
evals.expected_output: The agent inspects the existing ticket, determines it is already sufficiently shaped, and proposes only useful improvements — not a full reshape. It does not add ceremony for an already-clear ticket and does not add tracker comments on the user's behalf.
assertions: Acknowledges the existing ticket is already shaped
Does not create a full replacement ticket unnecessarily
Identifies any missing detail if present
States if the ticket is ready for Plan
Does not post or suggest posting a tracker comment on the user's behalf
